entry.data:
MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
NORTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN CLEARING
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
NORTHEAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
NORTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
NORTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

PARTLY SUNNY IN THE MORNING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
NORTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE MORNING
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE MID 70S
HIGHS IN THE MID 90S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HOT WITH HIGHS IN THE UPPER 90S
HIGHEST HEAT INDEX READINGS HEAT INDEX READINGS UP TO 105 IN THE AFTERNOON

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE MID 70S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
